CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-03-2017 Off Calendar

Notice Of Plaintiffs Motion For Default Judgment
Off Calendar Jan-05-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Lynn O'Malley-Taylor, Clerk: A. Mok. Proceedings reported by: Mitch Lyon, CSR#6840.

Leonard P. Mastromonaco, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, 1495 WALLACE 2, LLC, and THOMAS F. MURPHY, TRUSTEE OF THE MURPHY, TRUST UDT DATED OCTOBER 3, 2003, AND MARTINA MURPHY, TRUSTEE OF THE MURPHY, TRUST UDT DATED OCTOBER 3, 2003,
No appearance by defaulted defendant JAVIER MARISCAL,
Default of Defendant has been duly entered.

Witness: Michael Wares sworn and examined on behalf of Plaintiff.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant as follows:

Damages: $37,083.92
Pre-Judgment Interest: $1,889.10
Attorney's Fees: $8,341.25
Costs: $898.73
Total Judgment in the amount of $47,848.99

Judgment signed in open court.
